features: [ Jumbo Sized ] - SUWEN provides 40 inch 0-9 giant hot pink number balloons. This package contains a hot pink number 9 foil balloon, and an inflatable straw to make inflation and deflation more convenient

[ Exquisite Detail Design ] - Remember, you only need to fill the balloon slowly with 90% gas to fully inflate the balloon and prevent the balloon from bursting due to over-inflation. After filling the balloon, no need to knot, the air inlet is self-sealing with built-in glue, and it can be completely glued by pinching
[ Safe Material ] - Made of safe and non-toxic material, SUWEN balloons are eco-friendly and durable. In addition, the balloon is waterproof and can float in the water after being inflated
[ Party Essentials ] - This giant hot pink number 9 balloon can perfectly decorate your 9th birthday party or other anniversary events, and is also a great photo prop

[ Customer Service ] - If you have any problems or dissatisfaction during use, please contact us through the Amazon system mailbox; we look forward to customer suggestions so that we can better improve our products
description: Product Description SUWEN 40 Inch Hot Pink Large 9 Balloon Number SUWEN Professional Decoration Balloons Color enriches lives, why can't this art be applied to party balloons? “Make your party chic”, this is the original intention of our founding SUWEN. In order to promote SUWEN to the world, our professional color matching team is constantly exploring, developing and trying new combinations. Profession makes us unique. Sharing beautiful things with everyone is our common dream，and working for dreams is undoubtedly a happy thing for us. This giant hot pink number 9 balloon can perfectly decorate your 1st birthday party or other anniversary events, and is also a great photo prop. What's in the pack 40 inch hot pink number 9 foil balloon x 1 inflatable straw x 1 Remember, you only need to fill the balloon slowly with 90% gas to fully inflate the balloon and prevent the balloon from bursting due to over-inflation. After filling the balloon, no need to knot, the air inlet is self-sealing with built-in glue, and it can be completely glued by pinching.
